Ancelotti revela qual será a posição de Neymar na Seleção
content: Neymar vai para a Copa! Divulgação/ CBF Carlo Ancelotti confirmou que vê Neymar como um atacante mais centralizado na Seleção Brasileira. Em coletiva após a convocação final para a Copa do Mundo, o treinador explicou como pretende encaixar o camisa 10 no modelo da equipe, mesmo sem ter contado com ele durante o ciclo. A presença de Neymar foi um dos principais assuntos da lista. O atacante chegou à convocação cercado por dúvidas sobre condição física, sequência de jogos e encaixe tático, mas ganhou a confiança da comissão técnica depois de atuar com mais continuidade na reta final. Apesar disso, Ancelotti deixou claro que Neymar não chega com vaga garantida no time titular. Segundo o técnico, o camisa 10 terá o mesmo papel dos outros convocados: poderá jogar, começar no banco ou entrar durante as partidas, de acordo com o desempenho nos treinos e com as necessidades da equipe. Veja também: Neymar é convocado e tem última chance para vencer a Copa Neymar será usado por dentro Questionado sobre a função de Neymar e sobre onde imagina aproveitar o jogador, Ancelotti foi direto. O treinador afirmou que vê o atacante atuando de forma mais centralizada na Seleção. “Como atacante mais centralizado” , respondeu o técnico. A definição ajuda a esclarecer um dos pontos mais importantes da convocação. Como Neymar não participou do ciclo sob comando de Ancelotti, havia dúvida sobre se ele seria usado aberto pelo lado, como meia de criação ou mais próximo da área. A resposta indica que o camisa 10 deve ser pensado como uma peça por dentro, com liberdade para participar da construção, receber entrelinhas e se aproximar dos atacantes. A função também reduz a exigência de recomposição pelos lados e pode preservar melhor o jogador fisicamente durante a competição. Físico pesou na decisão Ancelotti afirmou que a dúvida sobre Neymar nunca foi técnica. O treinador disse que o talento do atacante já era conhecido pela comissão e que a avaliação central sempre esteve ligada à condição física do jogador. O técnico afirmou que Neymar será importante para a Seleção, mas evitou colocá-lo acima do grupo. A convocação, segundo ele, foi construída a partir da combinação entre evolução física, experiência em grandes competições e influência positiva no ambiente interno. “Pensamos que ele é um jogador importante e vai ser importante nesta Copa do Mundo. Além da parte física, tem experiência neste...

مفاجأة.. قرابة 2٪ من مقامري العالم يراهنون على فوز المغرب بكأس العالم 2026
content:
تتزايد قبل انطلاق كأس العالم 2026 حالة الجدل المرتبطة بأسواق المراهنات العالمية، خصوصا بعد تداول تقديرات تشير إلى أن قرابة 2٪ من المقامرين وضعوا ثقتهم في المنتخب المغربي للتتويج باللقب، في مؤشر يعكس حضورا رمزيا لافتا لأسود الأطلس ضمن نقاشات لا تخلو من الحماس بقدر ما تعتمد على الأرقام والاحتمالات.

ويأتي هذا الطرح في سياق تحليل موسع لحظوظ المنتخبات المتأهلة إلى مونديال 2026، قدمه الكاتب التايواني المتخصص في الشأن الكروي العالمي "هو جه تشانغ فا"، المعروف بمتابعته الدقيقة لأسواق المراهنات وتحليل نسب الترشيحات منذ عقود؛ حيث تم الاعتماد على معاملات المراهنات لتحويلها إلى نسب مئوية نظرية وفق قاعدة بسيطة، وهو ما يعطي صورة تقريبية عن ترتيب القوى المرشحة قبل انطلاق المنافسات.

ووفق هذه الحسابات، تصدر منتخب إسبانيا القائمة بنسبة 18.18٪، متقدما على منتخب إنجلترا بـ15.38٪، ثم منتخب فرنسا بـ14.29٪، في حين تتقاسم قوتا أمريكا الجنوبية ممثلتين في منتخب البرازيل ومنتخب الأرجنتين نسبة متساوية تبلغ 11.11٪ لكل منهما، ما يعكس استمرار حضورهما كأقطاب تقليدية في سباق اللقب.

وخلف هذه الصدارة، تأتي منتخبات البرتغال ومنتخب ألمانيا بنسبة 7.69٪ لكل منتخب، يليهما منتخب هولندا بـ4.76٪، ثم منتخب النرويج بـ3.85٪، ومنتخب بلجيكا بـ2.94٪، في حين يتقاسم منتخبي الولايات المتحدة وسويسرا نسبة 2.44٪، في مؤشر على تقارب نسبي في الطبقة الثانية من المرشحين.

أما في المراتب المتأخرة نسبيا، فتأتي منتخبات كولومبيا ومنتخب المغرب بنسبة 1.96٪، متبوعين بـمنتخب اليابان بنسبة 1.49٪، بينما تتقاسم منتخبات المكسيك والأوروغواي ومنتخب كندا نسبة 1.23٪ لكل منها، ويأتي منتخب الإكوادور في ذيل القائمة بنسبة 0.99٪.

ويستعيد التحليل في هذا السياق ما حدث في مونديال قطر 2022، حين بدت التوقعات الرقمية واثقة من أسماء بعينها، قبل أن تتغير المعطيات بشكل جذري فوق المستطيل الأخضر؛ حيث سقطت منتخبات مرشحة مبكرا، بينما فجر منتخب المغرب واحدة من أكبر مفاجآت تاريخ البطولة ببلوغه نصف النهائي، إلى جانب الحضور اللافت لـمنتخب كرواتيا، في مشهد أعاد التأكيد أن كرة القدم لا تحكمها الأرقام وحدها.

ويخلص هذا المنظور إلى أن قراءات أسواق المراهنات، رغم دقتها الحسابية، تظل احتمالات مفتوحة وليست حقائق نهائية، لأن تفاصيل المباريات، والتحولات التكتيكية، وحتى لحظات الحظ، قادرة على إعادة رسم خريطة البطولة بالكامل، وهو ما يجعل كأس العالم حدثا استثنائيا تتقاطع فيه الأرقام مع المفاجآت دون أن يحسم أحدهما النتيجة مسبقا.

Chileno preso por racismo em voo da Latam teve surto psicótico, diz defesa
content: A defesa do executivo chileno preso por cometer falas racistas, xenofóbicas e homofóbicas contra um comissário de bordo em um voo da Latam, no último dia de 10 de maio, se pronunciou na tarde desta segunda-feira (18). Germán Andrés Naranjo Maldini, que é executivo comercial há 10 anos da Landes, empresa de fabricação de pescados, foi flagrado em vídeo pelo funcionário o chamando de “preto” e “macaco”, inclusive imitando o animal. Ele foi afastado preventivamente da companhia nesse sábado (16). Segundo os advogados, Germán teve um surto psicótico . Ele já esteve internado desde 2013 e faz tratamento médico desde então. Além disso, a defesa afirma que o homem não se lembra dos fatos. “Está consternado em razão disto, pois reflete conduta incompatível com sua história de vida pessoal, familiar e profissional”. Em nota, o chileno pede “ desculpas para o funcionário da LATAM e para o povo brasileiro em razão de ofensas proferidas durante surto psicótico”. A defesa ainda diz que há grande preocupação com a saúde mental de Germán, que está preso preventivamente no CDP (Centro de Detenção Provisória) de Guarulhos. Ele faz uso contínuo de medicamentos e, de acordo com os advogados, “ a abstinência podem ocasionar novo surto e, por consequência, colocá-lo em risco junto aos demais presos “. “ Germán precisa de tratamento , sendo que sua transferência para uma clínica ou unidade hospitalar que possibilite a continuidade de seu tratamento em local adequado se mostra urgente”, finaliza. O chileno está preso há três dias . As investigações seguem em andamento pela Polícia Federal. A confusão teve início quando o passageiro tentou abrir a porta do avião e foi impedido pelos tripulantes e ao ser contido, iniciou uma série de ataques contra um funcionário da companhia aérea. title: Sony cancela sus juegos de PlayStation en PC y vuelve a la exclusividad
content: Sony ha dado marcha atrás en su intento por expandir sus juegos exclusivos a los ordenadores. A unos meses de que surgieran los primeros rumores , la compañía japonesa ha confirmado que no lanzará más títulos de sus estudios first party en PC . La decisión afectará directamente a los juegos narrativos single player, que ya no llegarán a Steam ni a ninguna otra plataforma de escritorio. Hermen Hulst, responsable del negocio de estudios de PlayStation, ha sido el responsable de comunicar el cambio a sus empleados durante una reunión celebrada este lunes. Según el periodista de Bloomberg , Jason Schreirer , los juegos narrativos como The Last of Us , God of War o Marvel's Wolverine serán exclusivos de la PS5 . La decisión no afectará a juegos como Marathon , Marvel Tokon y Horizon Hunters Gathering , así como a otros proyectos de estudios externos publicados bajo el sello de PlayStation. Si bien desde hace semanas ya se anticipaba esta decisión, el giro de vuelta a las consolas no deja de sorprender. Desde 2020, la compañía había llevado a Steam buena parte de sus franquicias más valiosas, como God of War , The Last of Us , Spider-Man 2 y Ghost of Tsushima . Hace apenas dos años, el propio Hulst se había comprometido a lanzar los juegos como servicio de forma simultánea en PC y PS5 , algo que se mantendrá. Ghost of Yotei no llegará a la PC porque Sony no lanzará más juegos single player en Steam. Xbox podría ser el culpable de que no se lancen más juegos de PlayStation en PC Detrás del cambio hay varios factores, pero principalmente tiene que ver con las ventas. Según Bloomberg , algunos juegos recientes de PlayStation han tenido un rendimiento comercial decepcionante en PC . Además, hay una corriente interna en la compañía que lleva tiempo argumentando que distribuir los juegos fuera de PlayStation perjudica la imagen de la consola y reduce los incentivos para comprarla. Uno de los rumores más fuertes que supuestamente influyó en esta decisión es la próxima Xbox . La consola de siguiente generación, conocida como Project Helix, usará una versión mejorada de Windows y podrá ejecutar juegos de PC de forma nativa . La posibilidad de que un título como God of War o Uncharted acabe funcionando en hardware de la competencia no le hace ninguna gracia a ciertos ejecutivos de PlayStation . Sea cual fuere el motivo de esta decisión, lo cierto es que los lanzamientos de juegos de PlayStation en PC no han estado exentos de...

San Diego Mosque Shooting Suspects: What We Know About 2 Suspects Killed at Islamic Center
content: Five people, including two suspected gunmen, have died following a shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego in San Diego, according to police sources. Police said the two suspects, believed to be aged 17 and 19, died from what investigators described as self-inflicted gunshot wounds. Authorities have not yet released their identities or provided details about a possible motive. The shooting prompted a major emergency response, with between 50 and 100 police officers deployed to the area after reports of an active shooter at the mosque in the Clairemont neighbourhood. Helicopter footage broadcast by local media showed the body of a person wearing what appeared to be a tactical vest lying outside the mosque complex. Images from the scene also showed a body covered by a yellow tarp near the Islamic centre. Police said a mosque security guard was among those killed. During a press conference, a San Diego police officer said the guard had "played a pivotal role in assisting", adding: "This could have been worse." BREAKING: At least 5 people killed, including 2 suspects and 3 adults, in shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego in California, police say. pic.twitter.com/Lljtlw92VB — AZ Intel (@AZ_Intel_) May 18, 2026 The Council on American-Islamic Relations said at least one mosque member had also died, although it was not immediately clear whether that person was the security guard or another victim. San Diego police later said "the threat at the Islamic center has been neutralized". Authorities said the suspects opened fire as a landscaper was working near the site. Officers then carried out door-to-door searches in the surrounding neighbourhood while emergency crews treated victims at the scene. Video circulated on social media appeared to show first responders performing CPR on two people near the mosque. The mosque’s imam, Taha Hassane, said in a video message that children and staff inside the centre had been safely evacuated. "We are safe, the entire school is safe. All the kids, all the staff, and the teachers are safe and out of the Islamic Center," he said. Several nearby schools were placed on alert or evacuated during the incident, including the Islamic School of San Diego and other schools close to the mosque complex. San Diego Mayor Todd Gloria said emergency personnel were "actively working to protect the community and secure the area". Law enforcement agencies in other parts of the United States, including the New York City Police...

content: (Photo Credit: HBO) The latest Lanterns teaser trailer has shown us more about the upcoming HBO show. Linney is a legend in the world of acting, and her involvement in the show should garner some excitement. The end of the trailer sees Stewart detailing his desire for the Green Lantern ring, and Linney telling him to “go and get it.” 2) Lanterns finally showing off its superhero vibes Hal Jordan trying to stop a cosmic invasion?? pic.twitter.com/IphXrYE955 — Everything_DCU (@EverythingDCU_) May 17, 2026 When the first Lanterns trailer was released, fans were not pleased. The show showed off little of the actual Green Lanterns aspect of the series, and left fans immediately worried. This time, though, DC Studios has peeled the curtain just a bit more, and we’re finally getting a look at the superhero vibes of the superhero show. The new trailer still keeps things mostly close to the chest, but undoubtedly is more “superhero” than anything we’ve gotten before. The new look not only shows off some of the powers of the Green Lanterns, but also teases the terrifying Sinestro, one of the main antagonists to the Green Lanterns Corps. When the show was originally announced as a detective series mixed with the iconic comic group, fans were excited at the premise. DuPage County Health Officials Warn After West Nile Mosquitoes Found
content: Mosquitoes carrying West Nile virus have turned up in three DuPage County communities, prompting health officials to issue an early-season warning before summer really hits full swing. Last Tuesday, the DuPage County Health Department confirmed that mosquito pools collected in Roselle, Glendale Heights and Wheaton tested positive for West Nile virus. No human cases have been reported in the county so far, but officials say the early detection points to a higher risk of mosquito activity and are urging residents to take the threat seriously. According to NBC Chicago , the positive mosquito samples were identified through routine laboratory testing, and county staff are continuing to monitor trap results throughout the season. The outlet reports the samples were collected last week, and local health staff have asked residents to report stagnant water and stick to the usual bite-prevention playbook. How to Fight the Bite The DuPage County Health Department highlights the “3 R’s” in its Personal Protection Index: reduce mosquito habitat, repel with EPA-registered insect repellent, and report problem areas to county staff. To cut down on breeding spots, the county recommends emptying birdbaths and outdoor containers at least once a week. People are also urged to wear long sleeves and long pants at dawn and dusk, when mosquitoes are most active, and to use the county’s reporting tools for dead birds or persistent standing water, the DuPage County Health Department says. What the Numbers Mean West Nile virus is the leading cause of domestically acquired arboviral disease in the United States, and recent national surveillance shows how routine it has become. A recent report from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention documented 2,628 human West Nile cases and 208 deaths in 2023. Most infections never cause symptoms, but when they do, illness typically starts two to six days after an infectious bite. In the most severe cases, patients may need hospitalization and can face long-term neurological problems; for more detail, see the CDC’s CDC clinical guidance . Statewide Picture DuPage is not alone. Testing across Illinois has already turned up infected mosquito pools in multiple counties this spring, signaling that the virus is circulating beyond local borders. As reported by CBS Chicago , the Illinois Department of Public Health has recorded positive mosquito batches in neighboring counties this season. Health officials say residents should keep an eye out...

Woman jailed on Rikers Island is third inmate to die of medical emergency there this year
content: Another Rikers Island inmate died while in custody from a reported medical emergency on Monday. The city's Department of Correction said Rajpattie Ramkellawan, 41, suffered the emergency while most recently residing at the Rose M. Singer Center on Rikers Island. Medical assistance was provided, but despite all efforts, she was pronounced dead just after 11:10 a.m. on May 18. Correction Commissioner Stanley Richards said the agency is investigating "the cause and the circumstances of this tragedy." "Our hearts are heavy with the tragic loss of an individual in our care," Richards said in a statement issued on Monday afternoon. "We extend our deepest sympathies to her friends, family and loved ones.” As per policy, the Correction Department said it had notified the Remediation Manager, Federal Monitor, the Board of Correction, the State Attorney General’s Office, the City Department of Investigation, the State Commission of Correction, the Office of Chief Medical Examiner, the Bronx and Queens District Attorneys and Ramkellawan of her death. Ramkellawan had been held in custody since her March arrest on a criminal possession of stolen property. According to court records, she had previously pleaded guilty to a count of burglary following a 2023 arrest in Manhattan's 24th Precinct. According to Katherine LeGeros Bajuk, a mental health attorney for New York County Defender Services, Ramkellawan, whom the firm represented, had struggled with numerous behavioral mental health challenges throughout her life. "Above all else, Rajpattie Ramkellawan was gentle and kind. She never lost her childlike innocence despite encountering unimaginable trauma and adversity," LeGeros Bajuk said. "Throughout her young life, she struggled to cope as many do and endured intractable behavioral health challenges. Her legal team is devastated by this tragedy, and our hearts go out to her loving and supportive family.” Ramkellawan is the third Rikers Island inmate to die in custody this year. Two others perished in March: John Price, 49, on March 28; and Barry Cosart, 39, on March 25. Both had suffered medical emergencies, the Correction Department reported. Last year, 15 people died while in custody at Rikers Island, according to the Vera Institute of Justice. In a social media statement , Mayor Zohran Mamdani expressed condolences to Ramkellawan's family while reasserting his belief that the city should move forward with plans to shutter Rikers. Umatilla National Forest continues road repairs
content: PENDLETON — The Umatilla National Forest announced it is continuing flood-recovery work with new repairs on Forest Service roads 47, 32 and 54, along with replacing the Little Tucannon bridge. The projects build on road and bridge repairs the Forest Service completed in 2025 following damage from the 2020 floods and initial emergency work, according to a press release. As each repair project begins, the Umatilla National Forest will provide information on temporary construction closures, expected timelines and other details, posting information on the forest’s website and at any ranger district office. Temporary closure signs also will be posted around project sites. Numerous repairs are taking place this year on the Pomeroy Ranger District. FSR 4712 road and bank repair is expected to take approximately six weeks, according to the announcement, and the road and associated trailheads and campgrounds will be temporarily closed during repair work. The replacement of the Little Tucannon Bridge will begin in July or August. The road will be temporarily closed at the bridge during the replacement and is estimated to take approximately two weeks. Also, this summer portions of FSR 47 will receive fresh chipseal, and the road will remain open while this project is ongoing. On the Walla Walla Ranger District, the first mile of FSR 32 had initial flood repairs to provide access to Corporation Guard Station (approximately 8 miles east of Gibbon) and to the bridge near Umatilla Forks Campground. The Federal Highway Administration will begin repair work this year on the 9 miles above the bridge. This work is intended to restore access on FSR 32 to Ruckel Junction. Supplies for the repairs were stockpiled last year and the work is estimated to be completed in 2027. On the North Fork John Day Ranger District, the first 4 miles of FSR 54 has been repaired to provide access to the Forest. The additional work planned for this year will repair flood damage on the next 4 miles of the road. Forest officials suggested visitors use caution and remain alert when traveling throughout the forest as conditions are dynamic.

México lanza “Tarjeta Roja” al trabajo infantil rumbo al Mundial 2026
content: El gobierno de México ha decidido marcar una línea clara en el terreno de juego social, Marath Bolaños, titular de la Secretaría del Trabajo y Previsión Social ( STPS ), junto a Pedro Américo Furtado de Oliveira, representante de la Organización Internacional del Trabajo (OIT), encabezaron el lanzamiento de la campaña “Tarjeta Roja” al Trabajo Infantil, una iniciativa que busca blindar los sectores productivos y turísticos frente a la explotación de menores en el marco de la Copa del Mundo 2026. El uso de la simbología futbolística no es casual, ya que para Pedro Américo Furtado, la tarjeta roja representa un límite absoluto y el momento en que una acción social simplemente no puede permitirse más. “El deporte tiene la capacidad de unir y movilizar, enviando un mensaje contundente de que el trabajo infantil no debe verse como algo normal o inevitable”. Te puede interesar Capital Humano Expectativas de empleo en México aumentan, 53% estima más contrataciones previo al Mundial 2026 Esta campaña, que la OIT ha impulsado globalmente por más de 20 años, cobra especial relevancia en México ante el contexto del Mundial. Marath Bolaños coincidió en que el fútbol es identidad y lenguaje universal, señalando que el evento servirá de vitrina para demostrar el compromiso del país con los derechos humanos. El director de la OIT en México recordó que la urgencia de esta acción está respaldada por datos críticos que indican que 138 millones de niñas y niños se encuentran en situación de trabajo a nivel mundial, de los cuales 54 millones realizan labores peligrosas que ponen en riesgo su salud e integridad. Furtado enfatizó que detrás de estas estadísticas existen trayectorias educativas truncadas y sueños interrumpidos, por lo que instó a dar cumplimiento a los convenios internacionales que exigen la protección de los menores frente a empleos que los priven de su infancia y desarrollo integral. La participación de Josefina Rodríguez, secretaria de Turismo, fue señalada como un pilar estratégico en esta causa. Furtado de Oliveira subrayó que sectores como el turismo requieren una respuesta articulada, donde la vigilancia y la corresponsabilidad institucional pueden marcar una diferencia profunda en los territorios. title: Il direttore di Mueller Water Products Healy acquista azioni per $30.018
Silicon Forest Stirring Back to Life as Portland Tech Hiring Ticks Up
content: After two bruising years for the Silicon Forest, Portland's tech workforce finally looks like it could catch a small break in 2026. CompTIA's latest State of the Tech Workforce forecast points to a modest gain in local tech jobs, hinting at stabilization rather than a full-on boom, with growth clustered in a handful of high-demand specialties. CompTIA's Forecast Nationally, the story is a bit sunnier. According to CompTIA , net tech employment is projected to grow about 1.9% in 2026, which translates to roughly 185,499 new jobs. Employers are increasingly chasing AI and data talent, and the report notes that job postings mentioning AI topped roughly 275,000 in January, a sign that these skills are reshaping hiring priorities. Portland's Numbers Locally, the outlook is more muted. The Portland Business Journal reports that CompTIA expects the Portland-Vancouver-Hillsboro metro to see only slight tech job growth in 2026 after two straight years of declines. That small uptick suggests an uneven recovery, with some firms easing back into hiring while others continue to trim their ranks. Local Headwinds Big corporate moves are still casting a shadow. Nike announced roughly 1,400 job cuts in April, with the company saying many of those reductions hit technology and global operations. Bloomberg reported the layoffs as part of a broader efficiency push that could offset some of the gains from smaller hiring bursts at local startups and tech service firms. What Jobseekers Should Know For workers, the opportunities look concentrated rather than broad-based. CompTIA highlights AI, cybersecurity and data roles as top hiring priorities, so training and certifications in those areas may give candidates a real leg up. How quickly employers and education programs pivot to those needs will go a long way in determining whether Portland's faint rebound turns into something more durable. Portland's 2026 tech outlook is cautiously optimistic, a small bright spot after recent contractions rather than a dramatic comeback. Local policy choices, hiring strategies and training investments will determine whether this year becomes a true reset or just a brief pause before more turbulence.

title: APC NASS primaries: Ondo Rep, Adefarati emerges unopposed
content: There was wild jubilation in Ondo, Akoko South East/Akoko South West Federal Constituency yesterday as member of House of Representatives, Hon. Dr. Adegboyega Adefarati, wins his second term ticket to the green chamber unopposed. According to the press release made available to newsmen on Tuesday, by the head of Hon. Adefarati’s media team, Olajide Ogbeye, reads in part: ...according to the 2026 Electoral Act, the votes cast for any uncleared aspirant in a party’s primary amount to nullity under the electoral guidelines.” “As the other two aspirants were disqualified or not cleared, the victory of Reps Adefarati is unopposed,” the team said. The team made the assertion while congratulating Adefarati on his emergence as the candidate of the All Progressives Congress (APC) for the federal constituency ahead of the 2027 general elections. “In a statement issued on Sunday to the newsmen, the media team said only aspirants cleared by the party’s screening committee were eligible to participate in internal party primaries. “It maintained that the participation of any disqualified aspirant contradicts established party and electoral procedures, stressing that such exercise could be rendered invalid. “We celebrate the emergence of our principal as the party’s candidate for the Akoko South East/South West Federal Constituency seat,” the statement read. “The team added that Adefarati had consistently preached peace, unity, love and confidence in the electoral process. “In a previous interview before the primary election, Otunba Adegboyega Adefarati said that he is a man of peace and that only God gives victory, and that has been confirmed in this process,” it stated. “The team further argued that party primaries must strictly follow screening guidelines, warning against attempts to legitimise the participation of disqualified aspirants. “Under the INEC regulations and guidelines for party primaries, an individual must be a validly cleared aspirant to participate in a primary election,” the statement added. “They further stressed that any deviation from the rule could compromise the credibility of the process, insisting that the law must be respected at all times. “If a party allows a person who was disqualified or not cleared by its screening committee to contest an internal election, the entire primary becomes a nullity,” the team said. “Any votes cast for an uncleared person are legally considered wasted votes because such a person does not exist in the eyes of...

Cómo maquillar las clavículas para resaltarlas y verte más delgada
content: En esta ocasión te diremos cómo puedes maquillar tus clavículas para hacerlas ver más delgadas y que estas resalten . Lo primero que debes hacer es comprar un iluminador en el maquillaje, este artículo ha ganado gran popularidad en los últimos años debido a que, dicho productor puede realzar otras áreas del cuerpo. Te puede interesar: 3 técnicas de “Body Glow” para resaltar clavículas y hombros ¿Por qué el iluminador en las clavículas hace ver más delgadas las clavículas? El iluminador en las clavículas resalta la piel y además aporta un brillo muy natural y saludable ya que crea un efecto luminoso que puede quedar con cualquier tipo de atuendo; además es fácil de aplicar, de hecho, se puede ocupar para cualquier tipo de ocasión, ya sean cotidianas o especiales cuando ocupas un vertido. Así debes ocupar el iluminador en clavículas para que se vean delgadas El primer paso es asegurarte de que tu piel se encuentre bien hidratada Aplica una base de crema hidratante para preparar la piel Con un pincel o con tus dedos deberás tomar una pequeña cantidad de iluminador y aplicarlo de manera cuidadosa en las clavículas y hombros Difumina muy bien para que no se queden marcadas las líneas Un consejo muy importante es no aplicar el iluminador de manera abundante ya que podría verse artificial Inicia con una pequeña cantidad y poco a poco añade más siempre y cuando sea necesario Otra opción es combinar el iluminador con un poco de bronceador No olvides sellar tu maquillaje con el spray fijador para que este dure todo mucho Foto de www.kaboompics.com ¿Qué es un iluminador y dónde se puede aplicar? El iluminador es un artículo de belleza , este producto se ocupa para resaltar algunas partes del cuerpo, estas áreas se verán con luminosidad , más específicamente si se ocupa en el rostro ; su función principal es crear puntos de luz que realcen la belleza natural de los rasgos faciales de cada persona. Cabe señalar que, el iluminador se puede ocupar en áreas como: pómulos, arco de las cejas, tabique nasal, parte superior de los hábitos y en la esquina interna de los ojos.

Ald. Gardiner Defends $1 Million Suit Against City: ‘What Price Can You Put On Your Reputation?’
content: JEFFERSON PARK — Ald. James Gardiner (45th) said his $1 million lawsuit against the city of Chicago, the Board of Ethics and former Inspector General Deborah Witzburg is about holding the government accountable. The lawsuit was filed in Cook County Circuit Court on May 11. The suit stems from a 2023 Board of Ethics decision that found Gardiner committed 10 ethics violations and fined him $20,000 after he ticketed 45th Ward resident Pete Czosnyka — a vocal critic of Gardiner’s — for having overgrown weeds. Gardiner appealed the ruling and all violations were dropped last June . During a Monday news conference, Gardiner and his attorney, Craig Tobin, said they arrived at the $1 million figure by calculating the emotional and financial toll the ethics investigation took on the alderperson. “This is about transparency and accountability, and to be frank, what price can you put on that? What price can you put on your reputation?” said Gardiner, who also confirmed he is seeking a third term in office. Over the past week, Gardiner has come under fire for seeking so much taxpayer money from the city. Leah Cunningham Pouw and S Gronkiewicz-Doran, who have both announced campaigns to run against Gardiner in the 2027 election, released statements criticizing Gardiner after news of the lawsuit broke. Cunningham Pouw called the lawsuit “self-serving” and “insulting.” “An elected official who constantly criticizes the city for reckless spending now wants to take $1 million from city taxpayers,” she said. Gronkiewicz-Doran said the suit is a “waste of city time and resources” and said the alderman should resign. Gardiner defended himself Monday, saying the city spent taxpayer dollars on a “witch hunt” when they launched the investigation into him. “If I don’t call them [city leaders] out on their hypocrisy, who will?” the alderperson said. Ald. Jim Gardiner (45th) gets emotional as he talks about his being cleared of violating ethics ordinance at a City Council meeting on June 18, 2025. Credit: Colin Boyle/Block Club Chicago Ethics Dispute In 2023, the Office of the Inspector General (OIG) found that Gardiner directed city employees to issue “unfounded citations” to Czosnyka for overgrown weeds and rodents. Czosnyka, whose yard was actually filled with native plants purchased through a city program, was initially hit with a $600 fine. He later went before the city and successfully fought the ticket. During an evidentiary hearing for Gardiner’s alleged ethics violations,...

New Mexico wildfire sparked by fatal medical plane crash spreads quickly in rural area
content: By SAVANNAH PETERS ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — A fast-growing wildfire sparked by the fatal crash of a small medical plane outside Ruidoso, New Mexico, has triggered evacuations for a rural area north of the Capitan Mountains and closures in the Lincoln National Forest, officials said Monday. The plane was en route from Roswell Air Center to Sierra Blanca Regional Airport when it crashed before dawn Thursday, killing the four people aboard. They were identified as pilots Keelan Clark and Ali Kawsara with the company Generation Jets and flight nurses Jamie Novick and Sarah Clark with Trans Aero MedEvac. “Our hearts remain with the families and loved ones navigating an unimaginable loss,” Matt Goertz, vice president of Trans Aero MedEvac, said in a joint statement with Generation Jets. The Federal Aviation Administration and the National Transportation Safety Board are investigating the crash. The wildfire grew rapidly over the weekend amid dry and windy conditions, nearly doubling in size between Sunday and Monday morning to more than 19 square miles. It was burning out of control in a sparsely populated area despite the efforts of more than 600 firefighters from the U.S. Forest Service, the Bureau of Land Management and several interagency Hotshot crews. Related Articles ICE agent charged with shooting man through door in Minneapolis Three people killed at Islamic Center of San Diego and two suspects found dead nearby Colorado Supreme Court orders Children’s Hospital to restart gender-affirming care As enrollment falls, old schools find new life as apartments Federal court rejects Elon Musk’s claims against OpenAI, saying he filed his lawsuit too late Adam Turner, a public information officer for the fire, said steep, rugged terrain has made it impossible for crews to engage the fire directly. “This is what firefighters call ‘mountain goat territory,’” said Turner, adding that crews were instead working to contain and steer the fire away from several evacuated cattle ranches to the northeast and the community of Arabella to the west. A red flag warning remained in effect across southern New Mexico on Monday, with wind speeds forecast between 20-30 mph (32-50 kph).

title: Three Ludhiana schools evacuated after bomb hoax emails
Man wrongly convicted of killing 2 Michigan hunters in 1990 agrees to $5.25M settlement
content: DETROIT (AP) — A man who spent nearly 21 years in prison for the deaths of two Michigan hunters agreed to a $5.25 million settlement after accusing police of failing to turn over evidence that could have helped him at trial, a lawyer said Monday. Jeff Titus was released in 2023 and his murder convictions were erased at the request of prosecutors. The Innocence Clinic at University of Michigan law school and two investigators got authorities to acknowledge that an Ohio serial killer might have been the person who killed the hunters in 1990. Titus had long declared his innocence. “It’s been a long road for Jeff,” attorney Wolf Mueller said. “He’s 74. He lost two decades of his life. The money doesn’t make up for the loss of decades, but it allows him to put this part of his life behind him.” An email seeking comment from the lawyer who defended a retired homicide detective in the lawsuit wasn’t immediately answered. Doug Estes and Jim Bennett were fatally shot near Titus’ property in Kalamazoo County in 1990. Titus initially was cleared as a suspect, but murder charges were filed against him 12 years later. Prosecutors portrayed Titus as a hothead who didn’t like trespassers. Students and staff at University of Michigan law school were trying to get him a new trial when a 30-page file from the original investigation was discovered at the county sheriff’s office. It was a blockbuster: It referred to an alternate suspect, Thomas Dillon of Magnolia, Ohio. Jacinda Davis, at the TV network Investigation Discovery, and Susan Simpson, through the podcast “Undisclosed,” had raised doubts about Titus’ guilt and aired questions about Dillon’s possible role. Dillon died in prison in 2011. He was arrested in 1993 and ultimately pleaded guilty to killing five people in Ohio who had been hunting, fishing or jogging. The lawsuit that was settled Monday did not center on Dillon as an alternate suspect. Rather, police were accused of violating Titus’ rights by not sharing information that could have cast doubt on the trial testimony of a key witness, Mueller said. Source

title: Mark Fuhrman Dead at 74, Ex-LAPD Detective From Los Angeles
content: Mark Fuhrman, the former Los Angeles Police Department detective whose testimony and taped use of racial slurs became a lightning rod in the 1995 O.J. Simpson murder trial, has died at 74. He was the officer who identified the now-infamous bloody glove that prosecutors argued tied Simpson to the killings, and his clash with the defense over race and credibility helped define the trial’s most explosive moments. His death effectively closes a chapter in one of Los Angeles’s most debated criminal cases. The Kootenai County Coroner's Office confirmed to TMZ that Fuhrman died "in the last week." The outlet, which first reported the story, said he died May 12 in Idaho and that, according to a close friend, he had been privately battling an aggressive form of cancer. NBC Los Angeles reports it has reached out to Fuhrman's family for comment. How He Became A Central Figure In The O.J. Trial Fuhrman vaulted to national prominence during O.J. Simpson’s 1995 murder trial, testifying about key pieces of evidence, especially a bloody glove recovered near Simpson’s home. Defense attorneys then confronted him with recorded interviews in which he used racial slurs, using those tapes to attack his credibility in front of the jury. At that moment, many reporters have noted, shifted the courtroom dynamic and public perception of the case, according to the Los Angeles Times . Later Years And The Decertification Ruling Fuhrman retired from the LAPD in 1995 and later reinvented himself as an author of true-crime books, a talk radio host, and a regular forensic commentator, according to NBC Los Angeles . Nearly three decades after the Simpson trial, the fallout was still catching up with him. In 2024, state officials barred him from ever returning to police work in California under a decertification law aimed at removing officers with criminal convictions or proven bias, as reported by AP . The ruling underscored how the controversies that erupted during the Simpson case continued to shadow his public life. Legal Notes Fuhrman’s most serious legal fallout arrived in 1996, when he pleaded no contest to a felony count of perjury after recordings surfaced that contradicted his sworn claim that he had not used racial slurs in the previous decade, per the Los Angeles Times . The plea kept him out of jail but left a permanent legal and reputational stain that later factored into disciplinary and certification decisions. Why The Case Still Resonates The Simpson trial reshaped how Los...

title: FACT FOCUS: Trump distorts recent revisions of scientific projections of global warming
content: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump recently blasted the accuracy of global warming projections in a Truth Social post that itself painted a distorted view of the science, projections and how the international community discusses climate policy. Every several years, the United Nations produces massive scientific reports on what’s happening and likely to happen with human-caused global warming. Scientists update some of the scenarios used to make future projections. One key control knob, which determines the amount and impact of future climate change, is carbon dioxide emissions from the burning of coal, oil and natural gas. The more carbon pollution, the more global warming, so scientists base their projections on a buffet of potential scenarios. Those scenarios triggered the president’s social media post over the weekend. Here’s a closer look at the facts: ___ TRUMP: “GOOD RIDDANCE! After 15 years of Dumocrats promising that ‘Climate change’ is going to destroy the Planet, the United Nations TOP Climate Committee just admitted that its own projections (RCP8.5) were WRONG! WRONG! WRONG!” THE FACTS: Trump was referring to a set of projections from 2011 from a group of scientists associated with the U.N.’s Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change that were updated in a study published in a scientific journal this spring. The update found that the old worst case scenario — called RCP8.5 — was implausible. The changes prompted scientists and non-scientists who downplay the harms or even deny the science of climate change to criticize in social media the international panel of climate scientists’ decades of work, which won a Nobel Prize. And it prompted mainstream climate scientists to explain the necessity for including unlikely scenarios and to point out that the change also reflects how the world has dramatically increased cleaner energy use, such as solar and wind power and electric cars. That has caused soaring carbon emissions to practically flatten. Even when it was created 15 years ago, that worst case scenario was unlikely — there were other scenarios that were considered more likely. But the most extreme scenario was still possible if the world went on a fossil fuel heavy binge, in particular continuing to use coal, the most dirty fossil fuel, in a big way. It projected an end of the century warming of about 8 degrees Fahrenheit (4.5 degrees Celsius) compared to the mid 1800s. It was not alarmism, said climate scientist Detlef Van Vuuren of...

Ancelotti surpreende ao indicar posição de Neymar na Copa do Mundo de 2026
content: Grande notícia da convocação da Seleção Brasileira para a Copa do Mundo, Neymar vai disputar seu quarto Mundial em uma nova posição, de acordo com o que o treinador Carlo Ancelotti adiantou. Na coletiva de imprensa após o anúncio da lista , o técnico italiano foi perguntado sobre como pretendia utilizar o camisa 10 do Santos na Copa . E respondeu: “como um atacante mais centralizado”. Leia mais Neymar comemora convocação com publicidade nas redes socias; confira Imprensa internacional repercute a convocação de Neymar para a Copa Relembre a trajetória de Neymar, convocado para a Copa do Mundo Vale lembrar que Ancelotti não tinha convocado Neymar desde que assumiu o cargo de treinador da Seleção Brasileira , sempre justificando a ausência por motivos físicos. No Peixe, o capitão vem jogando de forma diferente, mais como um camisa 10 clássico, buscando a bola no meio de campo e ditando o ritmo do ataque. Já Ancelotti o vê, a princípio, como uma espécie de falso 9. Neymar vai para ser reserva? Em outra pergunta da coletiva, o treinador italiano não deixou claro se pensa em formar o time ao redor de Neymar, como titular, ou utilizando o maior artilheiro da história da Seleção Brasileira como uma opção no banco de reservas. “Escolhemos (Neymar) porque pensamos em suas qualidades. Que jogue um minuto, cinco minutos, 90 ou pênaltis. Escolhemos esses jogadores que estão certo que vão trazer algo para a equipe. Por quanto tempo? Não sei”, ponderou Ancelotti. “Temos que focar na qualidade dos minutos. A equipe vai atuar de maneira coletiva no campo”, concluiu. title: Obsession 2 or TV Spin-off Could Happen Despite ‘Plot Hole,’ Says Director
content: (Photo Credit: Focus Features) Horror movie Obsession may get a sequel or a spin-off TV series in the future. Its director has teased an exciting expansion update. Curry Barker wants to make Obsession 2 or an anthology spin-off series Curry Barker ‘s directorial debut, Obsession, is currently playing in theaters. The horror movie features Michael Johnston and Inde Navarrette in key roles. After its big screen debut, the movie has received an amazing response at the box office, motivating Barker to make Obsession 2 or a spin-off. Made on a production budget of just $1 million, Obsession released in the U.S. on May 15, 2026, and collected $16 million in its opening weekend. On Rotten Tomatoes , it currently holds an impressive 95% Tomatometer score and 94% Popcornmeter score. In a recent interview with Total Film, Barker expressed his willingness to make an Obsession 2 despite the film having “kind of a plot hole.” He explained, “It’s something I don’t like to think about too much, because it totally doesn’t make sense that there’s a world of people just making wishes.” He added, “It really doesn’t make any sense at all.” Despite this, he is still interested in expanding the horror movie. “I obviously have a couple more things that I’m excited about next, but I do see Obsession 2, maybe.” Moreover, he teased an idea for a TV spin-off, saying, “what really is exciting to me is maybe an anthology, like a one-hour episode. Each episode is a different wish that goes completely off the rails. Maybe I’ll direct the pilot with the same DP, and you could invite other filmmakers to kind of give their spin at it. That would be really cool.” Obsession director Curry Barker would like to explore more deadly wishes in the future perhaps in a potential anthology series #Obsession pic.twitter.com/JLKCkpyTch — Total Film (@totalfilm) May 16, 2026 The official synopsis for Obsession reads, “After breaking the mysterious One Wish Willow to win his crush’s heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.” Before the latest movie made him a known filmmaker, Barker also worked on a 2024 found-footage horror film, Milk & Serial. He initially released it for free on YouTube. The post Obsession 2 or TV Spin-off Could Happen Despite ‘Plot Hole,’ Says Director appeared first on ComingSoon.net - Movie Trailers, TV & Streaming News, and More .

Westside Dog Park Showdown: El Paso Senior Shoots Pit Bull After Dust-Up
content: A tense Monday morning at Westside Community Park ended with a pit bull shot dead and a police investigation after an encounter between the dog and a Chihuahua reportedly turned aggressive on El Paso's west side. According to authorities, the confrontation unfolded just after 9:15 a.m., when a man in his 70s left the park, retrieved a firearm, then came back and fired at the pit bull. The dog belonged to a 44-year-old man who had been at the park with his pet, police said, adding that the city's Animal Cruelty Unit has opened an investigation and that no charges have been filed so far. What police say El Paso police say the older man initially left the park, then returned with a gun. When the dogs again showed aggression toward each other, the man shot and killed the pit bull, according to KVIA . The outlet reports the shooting happened just after 9:15 a.m. in the dog area at Westside Community Park, turning what started as a routine morning outing into a scene for detectives. Scene and park The incident unfolded in the park's designated dog area at 7400 High Ridge Drive, near the intersection with Redd Road and Resler Drive, on the far Westside. A "shots fired" call was logged in the 7400 block of High Ridge, according to Noticias El Paso . Police have not released the names of the two men involved, and officials say the scene is still being processed as part of the ongoing casework. Investigation The El Paso Police Department's Animal Cruelty Unit is leading the investigation and is gathering witness accounts and physical evidence from the dog park, KVIA reports. At this stage, police say no arrests have been made, and no charges have been filed, while detectives work to piece together the sequence of events that led up to the gunfire. Local context The shooting comes as El Paso Animal Services has ramped up neighborhood enforcement this spring, issuing nearly pet cops pile on citations for animal-welfare and "standards of care" violations, including work in and around Westside Community Park, as per Hoodline . City officials and shelter staff say field officers have been juggling heavier caseloads as calls for animal-related help climb with the rising temperatures. What to watch next Investigators will decide whether criminal charges or other enforcement actions are appropriate once the Animal Cruelty Unit finishes its review. Police say the case remains open and active, and they plan to release additional information if and when the findings of the...

Amazon.com Inc. (AMZN): Mark Cuban Remains Bullish in AI Era
content: We just covered the Mark Cuban Stock Portfolio: 8 Best Stocks to Buy and Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) ranks 1st on this list. For Mark Cuban, Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) stock is a long-term, high-conviction buy and hold investment. This strategy has yielded massive returns for Cuban, by his own admission. During an appearance on the The David Rubenstein Show a few years ago, Cuban acknowledged that he held stock in the technology giant, even admitting that he had bought shares when it was trading at “$500 and $700 per share”, later increasing his holdings as the price jumped further. During an appearance on news platform CNBC, Cuban called Amazon “the smartest company in the universe” due to the ability to disrupt multiple industries, from retail to cloud computing and healthcare. However, in recent years, Cuban has been publicly critical of some of the moves that Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) has made. For example, in a recent post on social media, he has cautioned entrepreneurs against over-reliance on the platform, labeling high seller fees as “insane and unsustainable.” He views heavy dependency on Amazon as a structural risk for small businesses, noting that the cost structure of the platform can quickly erode margins. This creates a striking duality in his perspective: while he remains a major shareholder who profits from growth, he simultaneously warns that the very practices driving that growth can make the platform a dangerous partner for the startups he often mentors. While we acknowledge the risk and potential of AMZN as an investment, our conviction lies in the belief that some AI stocks hold greater promise for delivering higher returns and doing so within a shorter time frame. If you are looking for an AI stock that is more promising than AMZN and that has 10,000% upside potential, check out our report about this cheapest AI stock . CNT quer transição de uma hora por ano caso fim da 6 X 1 seja aprovado
content: O presidente da CNT (Confederação Nacional do Transporte), Vander Costa , defendeu nesta 2a feira (18.mai.2026) uma transição para reduzir uma hora por ano na jornada máxima de trabalho caso a PEC que acaba com a escala 6 X 1 seja aprovada pelo Congresso. Durante participação na comissão que debate o projeto na Câmara, Costa afirmou que a medida é necessária para que as empresas de transporte absorvam os impactos da mudança sem precisar repassar custos à cadeia de produtos. “Aprovando a PEC, que tenha um período de transição. Se por acaso a gente for fazer uma transição de uma hora por ano, durante 4 anos, a gente vai fazer com que as empresas tenham mais capacidade de absorver esse custo sem passar para preço” , disse Costa. O projeto em discussão na Câmara reduz a jornada de 44 horas para 40 semanais com 2 dias de descanso e sem perdas salariais. A proposta da CNT é que a redução seja gradual. Apesar do pedido, o dirigente da Confederação faz coro aos discursos dos representantes da CNI (Confederação Nacional da Indústria) e da CNC (Confederação Nacional do Comércio de Bens, Serviços e Turismo), que se posicionaram contra a PEC durante a audiência e afirmaram que o caminho mais viável é a negociação coletiva por setor. Segundo a CNT, a obrigação de reduzir a jornada de trabalho terá impacto direto nos rendimentos das empresas de transporte. Esses custos seriam repassados para os produtos, o que impactaria a inflação e o poder de compra da população, de acordo com a análise da confederação. “O nosso setor trabalha com margem muito pequena. Os lucros das empresas são todos de um dígito só. Se eu tiver que aumentar a quantidade de trabalhadores ou tiver que pagar mais hora extra, isso vai implicar em aumento de preço” , declarou. O presidente da CNT estima ainda que eventual aprovação da PEC deve fazer com que o setor de transporte de cargas precise contratar mais 250 mil trabalhadores “num momento em que o Brasil está vivendo a pleno emprego e está faltando mão de obra” . O dirigente afirma que a PEC foi proposta em 2019, em um cenário de alta no desemprego, diferente da conjuntura atual do país. Vander Costa citou também possíveis impactos para motoristas de transportes urbanos. “Os ônibus urbanos têm que andar 7 dias por semana. Não há como tirar o direito de usar o transporte público. Por isso é comum no nosso setor ter jornada diferenciada. Tem uma jornada por exemplo 5 X 1, que deixa...

Conte-Napoli, l’addio è ormai questione di ufficialità: Sarri è il candidato principale per sostituirlo
content: Le sue parole in conferenza stampa, quelle di De Laurentiis circa un mese fa, un rapporto sempre più freddo. Tutti segnali che portano a una separazione tra il Napoli e Antonio Conte dopo due anni (uno scudetto e una Supercoppa Italiana vinti). Il tecnico ha già comunicato al presidente la sua volontà, che è quella di una separazione anticipata. Alla base della decisione i “soliti” problemi, tra cui il mercato. Finirà così con un probabile secondo posto l’avventura partenopea del tecnico leccese. Il candidato numero uno per sostituirlo è Maurizio Sarri, già allenatore del Napoli tra il 2015 e il 2018. Ci sono già stati dei contatti e nelle prossime settimane arriverà una decisione: tutto lascia pensare che sarà lui il tecnico azzurro, a meno che Giuntoli – che andrà all’Atalanta – non riuscirà a convincerlo a sposare il progetto nerazzurro. A quel punto Aurelio De Laurentiis si guarderebbe intorno e tra gli altri nomi in lista – secondo quanto riportato da Sky Sport – ci sarebbero Fabio Grosso – autore di un ottimo campionato al Sassuolo -, Massimiliano Allegri (che potrebbe lasciare il Milan) e Vincenzo Italiano. L'articolo Conte-Napoli, l’addio è ormai questione di ufficialità: Sarri è il candidato principale per sostituirlo proviene da Il Fatto Quotidiano .

Candidato izquierdista de Perú designa a un exministro para liderar equipo de plan económico
content: El candidato izquierdista a la presidencia de Perú , Roberto Sánchez , dijo el lunes ⁠que nombró a quien fue el primer ministro de Economía del exmandatario Pedro Castillo como jefe del equipo para su plan económico que presentará en los próximos días. Sánchez señaló que Pedro Francke , considerado como un economista moderado, trabaja en su equipo técnico y una de ⁠las primeras medidas que se contempla en caso llegar ⁠al gobierno es elevar la "remuneración mínima vital" en el país, a 1,500 soles (unos 437 dólares) mensuales desde los 1,130 soles actuales. Te puede interesar Geopolítica Autoridad electoral de Perú oficializa balotaje entre Fujimori y Sánchez "Hemos evaluado y estamos en capacidad de sustentar la viabilidad técnica, factibilidad económica y presupuestaria para subir la remuneración mínima vital", dijo a periodistas. Sánchez quedó en segundo lugar en unas elecciones cuyo resultado se conoció después de un mes, debido a retrasos en el recuento de votos. El candidato disputará la presidencia en un balotaje el 7 de junio con la derechista Keiko Fujimori, que postula al cargo por cuarta vez. Los planes de Sánchez anunciados en la primera ronda electoral , como una nueva Constitución y revisar los contratos de explotación de recursos, han preocupado a inversionistas en uno de los principales productores mundiales de cobre. Te puede interesar Geopolítica Fujimori y Sánchez lideran carrera hacia el balotaje en Perú, en recta final de conteo de votos La agencia calificadora Fitch Ratings dijo el lunes que la incertidumbre política seguirá siendo alta en Perú al menos hasta la segunda ronda electoral por la presidencia del país andino, aunque la introducción de una segunda cámara legislativa podría ayudar a reducir la inestabilidad. La hija del fallecido expresidente Alberto Fujimori es considera partidaria de un marco de política macroeconómica disciplinado; mientras que Sánchez planea la expansión del Estado, la transición a un modelo económico intervencionista y el uso de las reservas para el gasto corriente, agregó. Perú vive desde hace años en constante incertidumbre en medio de una alta rotación de sus funcionarios, con hasta ocho presidentes desde el 2018. Sin embargo, registra un crecimiento económico que aparece entre los más altos de América Latina. ¿Democratizar economía? NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA): Mark Cuban Highlights Importance of AI Literacy
content: We just covered the Mark Cuban Stock Portfolio: 8 Best Stocks to Buy and NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) ranks 3rd on this list. NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is one of the best AI stocks to buy. Mark Cuban often talks about the importance of AI in his posts on social networking platform X. Earlier this month, Cuban wrote to his followers on X that the first step towards knowing how AI will be used by a company was if the CEO had taken the time to understand AI, rather than delegate that skill. Per Cuban, “If the CEO has no clue, start to think about another job. Your company is going to be challenged over the next few years”. Cuban also talked about AI literacy in his post, outlining that for people who were intellectually challenged by their job, AI would further enable them to contribute to that growth. Per the billionaire, “The company will need as many people like you as it can get. It has a really good chance to outperform its competitors because it has an AI literate workforce”. READ ALSO: Lone Pine’s Non-AI Strategy Falters: 10 Non-AI Stocks Weighing Down Stephen Mandel’s 2026 Returns . NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is the poster child of the kind of AI literacy that Cuban is talking about in his post. In an era where tech firms are announcing mass layoffs, the chip giant is actively hiring for many positions. Cuban, in the same tweet mentioned above, also stressed this as a sign of growth, noting that more AI that leads to market success will lead to more employees, not less. Cuban claimed that AI was not easy to implement since it was new to everyone. He added that it was not a silver bullet that guaranteed success, but a tool that could accelerate growth and help smart people make smarter decisions. At the end of his tweet, he said that AI would lead to, “more competition to hire those that can stay up to speed and implement AI in personal and corporate workflows”. While we acknowledge the risk and potential of NVDA as an investment, our conviction lies in the belief that some AI stocks hold greater promise for delivering higher returns and doing so within a shorter time frame. title: Jens Littorin: Inte bara damen med Blåvitthalsduken som har tröttnat
Acusan formalmente a Alex Saab de lavado de dinero en una corte de Miami: quedará detenido sin posibilidad de fianza
content: Durante este fin de semana, el señalado testaferro de Nicolás Maduro, Alex Saab, aterrizó en suelo norteamericano luego de ser deportado oficialmente por Delcy Rodríguez, quien asumió el mando de Venezuela hace algunos meses. Tras su llegada, Saab se presentó ante una corte federal de Miami, donde enfrentará cargos por lavado de dinero. Saab ya había sido procesado penalmente en Estados Unidos. Sin embargo, este lunes fue procesado en el Distrito Sur de Florida por el cargo mencionado, además de conspiración para realizar transacciones financieras y ocultamiento del origen de los fondos. De acuerdo a lo informado por el Gobierno estadounidense, Saab quedará detenido hasta el próximo 24 de junio, sin posibilidad de fianza. La decisión fue tomada por la jueza Marty Fulgueira Elfenbein, quien fue la encargada de procesarlo tras su llegada a territorio norteamericano. En el pasado, Saab fue investigado en el país norteamericano por haberse enriquecido ilegalmente a partir de contratos gubernamentales. Tras ser detenido durante el Gobierno de Joe Biden en 2020 y ser extraditado, luego fue liberado en el 2023, tras un intercambio hecho por una decena de prisioneros en Venezuela. Al regresar al país, fue nombrado por Maduro como ministro de Industrias y Producción Nacional. Las investigaciones en contra de Saab apuntan a una compleja red internacional de socios, familiares, abogados y empresarios que participaron en los contratos del CLAP, negocios petroleros, exportaciones y movimientos financieros a partir de compañías registradas en Panamá, Hong Kong y otros países. La deportación del político venezolano se dio en el marco de una colaboración entre ambos gobiernos, tras el derrocamiento de Nicolás Maduro a inicio de este año, luego de una operación hecha por Donald Trump en la que lograron la captura del dictador y de su esposa, Cilia Flores.

Pamela Anderson e Tom Cruise alimentam rumores de romance
content: A atriz Pamela Anderson , 58, e o ator Tom Cruise , 63, alimentaram especulações de um possível romance após relatos de que os dois vêm se aproximando nos bastidores de Hollywood. A estrela, que conquistou fama mundial nos anos 1990 ao interpretar a salva-vidas C.J. Parker na série “S.O.S. Malibu” , passou os últimos dois anos reconstruindo sua imagem no cinema com uma sequência de projetos que renovaram o olhar da crítica sobre sua carreira. Leia mais Debbie Harry e Pamela Anderson serão mãe e filha em nova comédia Pamela Anderson fala pela 1a vez sobre romance com Liam Neeson Após 40 anos, Tom Cruise entrega primeira reação ao ouvir tema de "Top Gun" Entre eles está “A Última Showgirl” (2024) , dirigido por Gia Coppola, longa que impulsionou sua volta ao centro da temporada de premiações após décadas sendo associada ao rótulo de símbolo sexual. Os rumores envolvendo Pamela e Tom começaram depois que reportagens apontaram que o astro teria ficado impressionado com o trabalho da artista no filme . “O filme fez as pessoas enxergarem Pamela de uma maneira muito diferente, inclusive Tom. Eles mantêm contato desde então”, alegou um informante ao National Enquirer. O insider acrescentou: “Definitivamente existe uma química. As pessoas perceberam isso e comentaram com Tom.” As especulações ganharam força nos últimos dias após a divulgação de um vídeo que supostamente mostra os dois deixando o mesmo hotel , em Nova York, em momentos próximos. Após os relatos tomarem conta das redes sociais, uma fonte afirmou ao Daily Mail que Pamela estaria voltando a abrir espaço para o amor após “alguns anos dedicados a provar seu potencial”. Pamela foi ligada mais recentemente ao ator Liam Neeson , 73, seu colega no reboot de “Corra que a Polícia Vem Aí” (2025) . Os rumores de romance entre os dois cresceram durante a turnê de divulgação do filme, quando Pamela e Liam apareceram demonstrando intimidade em entrevistas e eventos de tapete vermelho. Em dezembro, a artista falou pela primeira vez sobre os relatos e confirmou que os dois tiveram um breve relacionamento após o fim das filmagens da comédia. “Tivemos um envolvimento romântico por um curto período, mas apenas depois que terminamos as filmagens. Tenho certeza de que estaremos na vida um do outro para sempre”, disse ela. Tom, por sua vez, está solteiro desde que terminou seu namoro com a atriz Ana de Armas , 38, em 2025. Salt Lake Feds Nail Noah's Event Bosses in $30 Million Venue Scam
content: A federal jury in Salt Lake City has convicted a group of Noah's Event Centers owners and executives after a five-week trial that prosecutors say peeled back a nationwide investment scam hiding in plain sight. Jurors heard how the business pitched investors, many through 1031 exchange deals, on buying fractional stakes in planned event venues and promised steady returns that never showed up, leaving investors holding the bag. The verdict follows years of civil and criminal scrutiny and clears the path for sentencing and potential restitution. According to a press release from the U.S. Attorney's Office for the District of Utah , the jury found Christopher J. Ashby, 52, Jordan S. Nelson, 45, and Scott W. Beynon, 49, guilty on all charged counts. That includes 17 counts of wire fraud and one count of conspiracy to commit wire fraud, all tied to what prosecutors say was a scheme that siphoned more than $30,000,000 from investors across the country. Three other codefendants had already flipped before trial. Founder William J. Bowser pleaded guilty on April 16; John D. Hamrick entered a guilty plea on Jan. 21; and Scott L. Rutherford pleaded guilty on June 9, 2025, as reported by ABC4 Utah . Those quiet courtroom moments came on the heels of bankruptcy filings, civil lawsuits, and years of investor complaints that helped draw in federal investigators. How the scheme worked Prosecutors and earlier reporting say the sales machine behind Noah's relied on a network of sales teams, real-estate brokers, and 1031 exchange specialists who pitched fractional "tenant-in-common" interests in planned venues, according to KSL . Glossy brochures showed polished, fully built event spaces and touted reliable rental returns. Investors were told their money would be funneled into construction and that their cash would be protected while buildings went up. Trial evidence, however, showed large chunks of investor funds were instead diverted to commissions and other expenses rather than construction. Unbuilt sites and next steps At trial, prosecutors walked jurors through satellite images of bare dirt and empty lots in Dublin, Independence, and Toledo, Ohio, as well as Jacksonville, Florida, and Carmel, Indiana. According to the U.S. Attorney's Office for the District of Utah , investors had been assured that those properties would soon house fully functioning Noah's event centers. Sentencing is expected in the coming months before a U.S. District Court judge at the Orrin G. Hatch...

title: Coursera Plus monthly plans are 40% off right now
content: When you buy through our links, Business Insider may earn an affiliate commission. Learn more Coursera/Business Insider Coursera deals aren't uncommon, but it's rarer that they don't require an annual subscription to earn. That's what makes the current discount so great: for a limited time, Coursera Plus is 40% off , bringing it down to $35 a month. Coursera is an online learning platform that offers unlimited access to more than 10,000 courses (and more) via a paid Coursera Plus subscription. Typically, a monthly subscription costs $59 — through May 25, it's 40% off. Shoppers can take advantage of this price for three months before the service will automatically renew at full price. It's one of the first deals we've seen all year that doesn't require an annual subscription, though technically, it's still cheaper to sign up with the service's typical $399 annual price. Coursera Plus offers a wealth of courses, Projects, Specializations, and Professional Certificate programs across a variety of subjects, including information technology, business, personal development, and humanities, among others. Some of the most popular courses include lessons from major companies, like "AI Essentials" by Google and "Python for Data Science, AI, and Development" by IBM . Interested customers can browse additional courses through the Coursera website, where classes included with a Coursera Plus subscription will have a badge. We've broken down everything you need to know about the platform in our full Coursera guide . Coursera Plus unlocks access to over 10,000 courses. Pavlo Gonchar/SOPA Images/LightRocket via Getty Images Coursera Plus deal: FAQs When does the Coursera deal end? The ongoing Coursera monthly deal ends on May 25. Until then, shoppers can get 40% off the monthly service for their first three months. Can current Coursera Plus subscribers get the deal? The deal is only valid for new Coursera Plus subscribers, so existing customers won't be eligible. The offer is limited to one per person. Steve Bannon and others in MAGA world beg Trump to control AI
content: A bunch of the MAGA movement’s artificial intelligence skeptics just released some ideas on how to rein in AI companies. But their so-called solutions are ripe for authoritarian manipulation. In an open letter to President Donald Trump, various conservative influencers and allied lawmakers, including Trump whisperer Steve Bannon and “Stop the Steal” activist Amy Kremer , expressed concerns about AI’s potential to wreak havoc on society. Bannon has counted himself among the Trump supporters concerned about the administration’s alignment with uber-rich, power-hungry tech bros , such as Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg . Such skepticism is justified. But the letter writers’ solution to the rise of increasingly powerful AI? Not so much, in my view. Right off the bat, the letter’s cosigners, who write under the banner of “Humans First,” shower their leader with some gushing praise utterly detached from reality: America under your leadership has led the world through strength and wisdom, not recklessness. We urge you to continue with this, and apply that principle to artificial intelligence, taking decisive action to ensure that the most powerful AI systems in the world are properly vetted before they can threaten our national security, our children, American workers and the American way of life. As the letter continues, the cosigners make clear they want to formalize a plan Trump has sought to implement: a requirement that the government vet AI tools before they are made available. After saying their concerns include AI-assisted bioweapons, they wrote : For this reason, we support proposed policies that require mandatory testing, evaluation, vetting, and government approval of potentially dangerous frontier AI systems before they are deployed. This is the sort of strong, principled, and pragmatic leadership you have shown throughout your presidency. It’s unclear what “government approval” means, exactly. I suppose it could mean “lawmakers,” and congressional involvement seems like it could be fruitful. But the letter makes no reference to Congress — or anyone other than Trump. And that lack of clarity alone ought to raise eyebrows about this letter. After all, there’s no reason to believe that Trump — whose administration has enabled segregation and other forms of discrimination , promoted white supremacist propaganda and framed liberals as enemies of the state — has much interest in safely implementing AI tools into our society. That has seemed painfully obvious...

County releases recommended 2026-27 budget with eye to stability
content: San Diego County released its recommended budget for the 2026-2027 fiscal year on Monday with the stated goal of maintaining stability, while still responding to the changing needs of local communities. The $9.1 billion plan represents a 6% increase over the current budget. According to a county statement , the proposal was shaped with input from the community, as well as the Board of Supervisors and subcommittees, to focus on maintaining core services. “The plan augments public safety to meet the added responsibilities of Proposition 36 and supports health and safety-net services impacted by federal policy changes of H.R. 1,” the statement said. “It expands behavioral health care and continues critical investments in homelessness response, public health and infrastructure while also maintaining vital community services like libraries and parks.” Proposition 36, the Homelessness, Drug Addiction, and Theft Reduction Act, gave prosecutors the ability to charge people convicted of various third- time drug offenses with a “treatment-mandated felony,” giving them a choice between behavioral health treatment or up to three years in jail or prison. County leaders said the recommended budget is balanced, and required thoughtful choices due to uncertain funding from the state and federal government. Those sources account for nearly half of the county’s funding. “This balanced budget did not happen by accident. It is the result of hard work, hard decisions, and a clear commitment to protect the services San Diegans rely on,” Board of Supervisors Chair Terra Lawson-Remer said. “We looked under every rock before asking families to absorb service cuts. “We modernized outdated systems, tightened spending, unlocked reserves responsibly, and prepared for the first wave of federal impacts. This budget shows residents they can trust us to do the hard fiscal work first: find savings, protect services, and prepare for what’s coming.” The recommended budget includes 20,388 staff positions, a net increase of 108. Other highlights of the budget include: $176 million for behavioral health treatment and 24-hour support in a “structured, therapeutic setting” for people needing a higher level of care; $25.6 million for watershed protection efforts to reduce ocean pollution and promote clean beaches, healthy ecosystems and safe drinking water; $93.1 million to develop and maintain affordable and supportive housing; $265.9 million for road safety and maintenance projects; $71.5...

❖ MANABÍ▮Certificado de gravamen pasa de USD 8 a 12,05
content: El Registro de la Propiedad y Mercantil del cantón Sucre informó sobre una reforma a la ordenanza que regula los servicios registrales, la cual incluye nuevos valores y cambios en la vigencia de algunos documentos. Entre las modificaciones más relevantes está el incremento en el valor del Certificado de Gravamen, que ahora tendrá un costo de USD 12,05 y una vigencia de 45 días. Anteriormente, este documento costaba USD 8,00 y tenía una validez de 30 días. Según la entidad, la actualización busca fortalecer y modernizar los servicios registrales, además de ampliar la cobertura y vigencia de los documentos emitidos. La medida ya fue aprobada y se aplicará conforme a las disposiciones establecidas en la reforma. La entrada ❖ MANABÍ▮Certificado de gravamen pasa de USD 8 a 12,05 se publicó primero en Infórmate Manabí Periodismo Digital .

title: ‘Surpresa’, ‘bomba’ e ‘última dança’: imprensa internacional reage à convocação de Neymar para Copa
content: A presença de Neymar na lista final da seleção brasileira para a Copa do Mundo 2026 teve grande repercussão não só no Brasil como também na imprensa internacional. Jornais ao redor do mundo destacaram o a convocação do craque pelo técnico Carlo Ancelotti, que ainda não havia chamado o jogador desde que assumiu o cargo e pôs em dúvida a participação do atacante de 34 anos no Mundial. O diário espanhol Marca classificou a convocação de Neymar como “surpresa” e disse que Ancelotti “escutou o Brasil” ao chamar o atacante do Santos. O jornal As , também da Espanha, tratou a ida do jogador, a quem chamou de “Rei”, à Copa do Mundo como uma “bomba mundial”. “Toda a nação brasileira explodiu em euforia. Ele sofreu muito, em silêncio, mas o camisa 10 conquistou seu lugar na Copa do Mundo, a última de sua carreira”, escreveu o As . Após longa novela, Neymar foi confirmado na lista final de Ancelotti para a Copa do Mundo. O jornal francês L’Équipe destacou a convocação do craque como a “última dança” do camisa 10 pela seleção brasileira. “É uma surpresa que muitos já haviam perdido a esperança: Neymar terá uma última chance com a seleção brasileira. A inclusão do atacante de 34 anos na lista de 26 jogadores, que não atua pela Seleção desde 18 de outubro de 2023 (derrota por 2 a 0 para o Uruguai), foi alvo de intenso debate nos últimos meses.” Já o Olé, principal diário esportivo da Argentina, tratou como “milagre” a convocação de Neymar para a Copa e afirmou que o atacante poderá ajudar a seleção com a sua experiência. “Num Brasil que, ao contrário de outras épocas, conta com nomes mais acessíveis (excluindo superestrelas como Vinicius e Raphinha), o carismático Neymar contribuirá com sua experiência em jogos desta magnitude. E com sua liderança, mesmo que venha do banco de reservas. Um grande trunfo para Ancelotti, sob qualquer perspectiva, para comandar a equipe diante das adversidades.”

title: Kentucky’s Thomas Massie Is About to Test the Reach of Trump’s Revenge Politics
content: Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky speaks to members of the media about the Epstein Files Transparency Act outside the U.S. Capitol on Nov. 18, 2025. —Heather Diehl—Getty Images The biggest, most expensive test of President Donald Trump’s hold on the Republican Party is now here: whether Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky can weather the long-simmering contempt from the White House for a maverick lawmaker who, in his own words , has “no Fs to give now.” Tuesday’s primary in Kentucky will measure if someone who runs afoul of Trump can survive in this Trump-saturated environment. Massie seems unbowed and is touting his rift with the White House as a selling point for another term. A rebel without a coalition, Massie voted against the President’s tax cuts, saying they were too irresponsible with red ink. He hates the war in Iran and hasn’t been afraid to say so. He’s been critical of political money for Israel. And he led the charge to open the Epstein files over Trump’s objections. All of which have drawn the President’s ire in a season of bracing acts of Republican-on-Republican purity tests that are not entirely grounded in reality. Trump’s approval ratings are parked in the 30s. Fellow Republicans are, frankly, steamed at how he’s been dragging down their hopes of holding House and Senate majorities heading into November. In a highly unusual breach of protocol—and in the middle of a war—Trump dispatched Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth to the campaign trail to stump for Ed Gallrein, a dairy farmer and former Navy SEAL vying against Massie for the GOP nomination. Trump has already exacted revenge on state lawmakers in Indiana for not gerrymandering the congressional map at halftime and then tanked Sen. Bill Cassidy’s re-election bid in Louisiana on Saturday. That same day, he threatened Rep. Lauren Boebert of Colorado with a primary for coming to the defense of Massie. This is a President whose agenda can only be described in one bitter word: vengeance. It’s bad for the steady-as-she-goes wing of the Republican Party, a hurdle for a GOP that sees the writing on the wall as voters are souring by the hour on that party’s brand, and a frustration of the party strategists desperate to hold the line against historical headwinds. If this is the political climate of Trump’s making, the next half-year is going to be one of turmoil and tumult. Revenge may feel good in the quick turn, but it may help deliver a Democratic Congress empowered with two years of oversight,...
